10+ Years of Music
About KrishanSax

Music Is Not
Just a Passion —
It's a Way of Life

Hi, I’m Krishan .I am a professional saxophonist based in Sri Lanka, bringing nearly 4 years of experience performing across a wide range of genres, from smooth jazz and neo-soul to contemporary pop. I’ve had the privilege of performing at prestigious venues and events across the country, breathing life into every space with my music. Whether you need a soulful backdrop for a wedding, an electrifying vibe for a corporate event, or a unique live performance for any occasion, I bring heart, skill, and stage presence to every single set. Let's make your next event unforgettable.

400+
Live Performances
50+
Corporate Events
What I Offer

Services &
Categories

From intimate gatherings to large-scale productions, I tailor every performance to suit the vibe, audience, and occasion. Here's how I can be part of your event.

Wedding Performances

From ceremony to reception, I create an unforgettable musical atmosphere for your most special day. Custom song arrangements available.

Jazz & Live Concerts
